name: Merge and Double
author: Poki
description: In Merge and Double, it's all about the big numbers! In this tile matching game, you need to line up numbers of the same value next to each other in order to match them. When two numbers match, the value of the tile will be doubled! Stuck or in need of a boost? Don't worry, there are multiple power-ups available to help you out! Can you merge the largest number and get the highest score? How to play Merge and Double? Click or tap to merge the tiles! Who created Merge and Double? Merge and Double was created by Adgard. Play their other games on Poki: Freecell Solitaire , Merge Mosaics and Merge to Million ! How can I play Merge and Double for free? You can play Merge and Double for free on Poki. Can I play Merge and Double on mobile devices and desktop? Merge and Double can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
